title: Switzerland talks called off: Why the delay and what it means for US-Iran MoU roadmap
content:
Scheduled talks in Switzerland have been cancelled or postponed.
*   The primary focus is on understanding the reasons behind this delay.
*   The cancellation raises questions about its implications for the US-Iran Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) roadmap.

title: Direct tax mop-up grows over 14% to over ₹5.21 lakh crore on higher advance tax payments
content:
Direct tax collections have grown by over 14%.
*   The total direct tax mop-up now exceeds ₹5.21 lakh crore.
*   This significant growth is attributed to higher advance tax payments.
